recent_projects.name: scholar-flux
recent_projects.summary: The ScholarFlux API is an open-source project designed to streamline access to academic and scholarly resources across various platforms for discovery and analyses. It offers a unified API that simplifies querying academic databases, retrieving metadata, and performing comprehensive searches within scholarly articles, journals, and publications.
recent_projects.author: Sammie L. Haskin
